summary: Using Stopko tips, sodium hypochlorite and an EDTA solution from option A effectively clean and prepare the pulp chamber by providing both strong antimicrobial properties and tissue dissolution capabilities crucial for successful endodontic treatment. No other provided solutions combine these critical functions adequately.
